mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agri_product (name, description, price, stock, status, images, created_by) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{status}, #{images}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE agri_product SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, price = #{price}, stock = #{stock}, status = #{status}, images = #{images}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, description, price, stock, status, images, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM agri_product WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, name, description, price, stock, status, images, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM agri_product ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, name, description, price, stock, status, images, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM agri_product
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND UPPER(TRIM(status)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{status}))
ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, name, description, price, stock, status, images, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM agri_product WHERE status = 'ON_SHELF' ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM agri_product WHERE status = 'ON_SHELF'
SELECT id, name, description, price, stock, status, images, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM agri_product WHERE status = 'ON_SHELF' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE agri_product SET stock = stock - #{qty}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND stock >= #{qty}
